items.title: Advancing content provenance for a safer, more transparent AI ecosystem
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI advances AI content provenance with Content Credentials, SynthID, and a verification tool to help people identify and trust AI-generated media.

items.title: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise enterprise environments
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI and Dell partner to bring Codex to hybrid and on-premise environments, helping enterprises deploy AI coding agents securely across data and workflows.

items.title: OpenAI and Malta partner to bring ChatGPT Plus to all citizens
items.lead_paragraph: OpenAI and Malta partner to expand AI access, offering ChatGPT Plus and training to help citizens build practical AI skills and use AI responsibly.

items.title: A new personal finance experience in ChatGPT
items.lead_paragraph: Preview a new personal finance experience in ChatGPT for Pro users in the U.S. Securely connect your financial accounts and get AI-powered insights and guidance grounded in your financial context, goals, and priorities.

items.title: How business operations teams use Codex
items.lead_paragraph: See how business operations teams can use Codex to create initiative briefs, strategy updates, leadership decision packets, progress updates, and more from real work inputs.

items.title: How data science teams use Codex
items.lead_paragraph: See how data science teams can use Codex to build root-cause briefs, impact readouts, KPI memos, scoped analyses, and dashboard specs from real work inputs.

items.title: How sales teams use Codex
items.lead_paragraph: See how sales teams can use Codex to create pipeline briefs, meeting prep packets, forecast reviews, account plans, and stalled-deal diagnoses from real work inputs.

items.title: Databricks brings GPT-5.5 to enterprise agent workflows
items.lead_paragraph: Databricks uses GPT-5.5 for enterprise agent workflows after the model set a new state of the art on the OfficeQA Pro benchmark.

items.title: Sea's View on the Future of Agentic Software Development with Codex
items.lead_paragraph: Sea Limited's CPO explains why the company is deploying Codex across engineering teams to accelerate AI-native software development in Asia.

items.title: Work with Codex from anywhere
items.lead_paragraph: Use Codex anywhere with the ChatGPT mobile app. Monitor, steer, and approve coding tasks in real time across devices and remote environments.

items.title: Helping ChatGPT better recognize context in sensitive conversations
items.lead_paragraph: Learn how new ChatGPT safety updates improve context awareness in sensitive conversations, helping detect risk over time and respond more safely.

items.title: Building a safe, effective sandbox to enable Codex on Windows
items.lead_paragraph: Learn how OpenAI built a secure sandbox for Codex on Windows, enabling safe, efficient coding agents with controlled file access and network restrictions.

items.title: Fast-tracking genetic leads to reverse cellular aging
items.lead_paragraph: Biologists use Co-Scientist to find novel factors that successfully rejuvenate human cells.

items.title: Simulate real-world places with Project Genie and Street View
items.lead_paragraph: We’re expanding access to Google AI Ultra subscribers globally and introducing a new capability powered by Street View.

items.title: Introducing Gemini Omni
Introducing Google Antigravity 2.0
Gemini for Science: AI experiments and tools for a new era of discovery
items.lead_paragraph: A collection of science tools and experiments to expand the scale and precision of scientific exploration.

items.title: Making it easier to understand how content was created and edited
items.lead_paragraph: We're expanding our tools to help you understand how content was created and edited across the web.

items.title: Finding the molecular switches behind new infectious diseases
items.lead_paragraph: Clare Bryant uses Co-Scientist to identify genetic triggers in emerging infectious diseases.

items.title: Opening new paths in aging research
items.lead_paragraph: Calico Life Sciences uses Co-Scientist to connect scattered findings and generate new leads in aging research.

items.title: Accelerating discovery of liver disease mechanisms
items.lead_paragraph: Filippo Menolascina uses Co-Scientist to identify new liver disease treatments and explain why existing drugs only help certain patients.

items.title: Uniting biological toolkits for a new approach to ALS
items.lead_paragraph: Co-Scientist unites Boston Children’s Hospital and MIT’s labs to explore new RNA-based treatments for ALS.

items.title: Uncovering repurposed medicines to fight liver fibrosis
items.lead_paragraph: Stanford geneticist uses Co-Scientist to help find new treatments for chronic liver disease and liver fibrosis.

items.title: How WeatherNext helped the National Hurricane Center better predict Hurricane Melissa’s historic landfall in Jamaica
items.lead_paragraph: Learn how our WeatherNext AI model help forecasters give communities unprecedented time to prepare ahead of  the historic Hurricane Melissa.

items.title: Gemini 3.5: frontier intelligence with action
items.lead_paragraph: Gemini 3.5 is built to help you execute complex, agentic workflows.
